tasks.subject: Task 1: Core::Jobs::ThreadPool + ParallelFor
tasks.description: Minimal persistent fork-join ThreadPool + blocking ParallelFor + MU_JOBS flag, doctest-tested. Files: src/source/Core/Jobs/ThreadPool.{h,cpp}, tests/jobs/{CMakeLists.txt,test_thread_pool.cpp}, tests/CMakeLists.txt, src/CMakeLists.txt. Verify: ctest -R test_thread_pool.

tasks.subject: Task 2: WorkerArena — per-worker per-vertex scratch (serial-identical)
tasks.description: Move ~30MB per-vertex scratch (VertexTransform/NormalTransform/IntensityTransform/LightTransform/g_chrome) into per-worker WorkerArena via thread_local pointer + accessor macros; serial-identical. Files: src/source/Render/Build/WorkerArena.{h,cpp}, ZzzBMD.{cpp,h}, Winmain.cpp, src/CMakeLists.txt, tests/jobs/test_worker_arena.cpp. Verify: ctest -R test_worker_arena + harness [bmd_cov] identical.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Bone palette per-entity + reentrancy audit (serial-identical)
tasks.description: Build bone matrices into per-entity OBJECT->BoneTransform; move build-time globals (BoneTransform scratch, g_chromeage/up/right, g_smodels_total snapshot, Hero->TargetCharacter clear) to arena/per-entity/read-only/Phase G; audit doc. Serial-identical. Files: ZzzBMD.cpp, WorkerArena.h, ZzzCharacter.cpp, ZzzObject.cpp, docs/perf/08-jobs-audit.md.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Per-worker instance buckets + merge (serial-identical)
tasks.description: BmdInstanceBatch collects into per-worker bucket sets, merges order-independently at flush; per-worker palette TBO staging rebased. Serial uses worker 0 = identical. Merge unit-tested. Files: BmdInstanceBatch.{cpp,h}, BonePaletteTBO.{h,cpp}, tests/jobs/test_bucket_merge.cpp.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Phase G/B/F restructure of the char pass (serial)
tasks.description: Restructure RenderCharactersClient into Gather (cull+interp+cloaked-target-clear→VisibleList) / Build (per-entity loop) / Flush, serial, identical output. Files: src/source/Render/Build/VisibleList.h, ZzzCharacter.cpp, MainScene.cpp.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Turn on parallelism (Phase B via ParallelFor) — the win
tasks.description: Phase B via ThreadPool::ParallelFor under MU_JOBS (serial below threshold); [jobs] profiling; race audit pass. Output identical on AND off; Phase B wall-time drops at 100/200ch. Files: ZzzCharacter.cpp, BmdGpuCache.cpp, FrameProfiler.h.

metadata.verifyCommand: harness MU_JOBS=0 vs 1 at 100ch+200ch; [jobs] build ms parallel<<serial; [bmd_cov] identical; in-game multi-map

tasks.subject: Task 7: Extend to the objects pass (props) — optional, if ROI remains
tasks.description: Apply G/B/F + ParallelFor to RenderObjects/RenderObjects_AfterCharacter reusing infra; if ROI negligible, document and stop. Files: src/source/Engine/Object/ZzzObject.cpp.

metadata.verifyCommand: harness at prop-dense map; [frame] objects parallel<serial; visual identical
